name: Exclusion from 4% Gross Transportation Tax

eligibility.description: Requires a fixed place of business in the U.S. and for income to be attributable to regularly scheduled transportation.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows transportation income to be treated as effectively connected income (ECI) instead of being subject to the 4% gross tax, allowing for deductions.
